text:
Representatives from local law enforcement, including the Sheriff's Office and Batavia PD, participated in theArc GLOW Torch Run on Thursday morning in support of the Special Olympics.  The route took the officers from the Sheriff's Office on Park Road to the Arc facility on Walnut Street in Batavia.
